raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 2605 would create a three-year moratorium on non-mandated law enforcement calls by foster care facilities for behavioral management of youth in non-emergency situations.",
    "In 2016, of the 6,217 non-mandated calls statewide for youth behavior, 60% were for non-aggressive behavior.",
    "The calls for non-aggressive behavior resulted in 435 youth being cited, 527 youth being detained or arrested, and another 319 youth being booked into juvenile hall.",
    "Reliance on law enforcement as a behavioral management response to children who have been abused and neglected is inconsistent with the goal of the state’s child welfare system.",
    "Good parenting of youth in foster care never involves relying on the police to be the disciplinarian when there are minor incidents."
  ]
}
```
